quick_skim.title: HeadRoom: Lightweight, Edge-deployable Pipeline for Adaptive Notification Routing
quick_skim.abstract: Emerging wearables, such as smart glasses, can deliver notifications through multiple sensory channels, but there is still a limited understanding of how to choose the right channel at the right moment. We propose HeadRoom, a lightweight, edge-deployable pipeline that estimates the availability of visual and auditory channels in real time from egocentric video and audio. Our controlled user study (N=25) shows that, under high perceptual load, routing notifications to the more available channel reduces response time relative to routing them to the less available channel. This work opens up a new possibility for adaptive routing of notifications in wearable and immersive systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: adaptive notification routing based on perceptual load from egocentric video, aligns with proactive gaze-based interaction
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于第一人称视频感知负载的自适应通知路由，与基于注视的前瞻性交互范式一致
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于第一人称视频感知负载的自适应通知路由，与基于注视的前瞻性交互范式一致
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于第一人称视频感知负载的自适应通知路由，与基于注视的前瞻性交互范式一致
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: HeadRoom is a lightweight pipeline that estimates visual/auditory channel availability from egocentric video and audio on smart glasses, enabling adaptive notification routing that reduces response time under high load, supporting proactive system response.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 智能眼镜等可穿戴设备需在多个感官通道中自适应分发通知，但如何选择最佳时机和通道尚不清楚。HeadRoom提出一种轻量级可边缘部署的管道，从第一人称视频和音频中实时估计视觉和听觉通道的可用性，根据感知负载将通知路由到可用性更高的通道。用户实验表明，在高感知负载下，该策略显著降低了响应时间。该工作为可穿戴系统实现前瞻性自适应通知分发提供了新途径。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 智能眼镜等可穿戴设备需在多个感官通道中自适应分发通知，但如何选择最佳时机和通道尚不清楚。HeadRoom提出一种轻量级可边缘部署的管道，从第一人称视频和音频中实时估计视觉和听觉通道的可用性，根据感知负载将通知路由到可用性更高的通道。用户实验表明，在高感知负载下，该策略显著降低了响应时间。该工作为可穿戴系统实现前瞻性自适应通知分发提供了新途径。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: gaze based interaction paradigms for proactive system response

quick_skim.title: Spontaneous eye blinks as temporal markers of internal attention
quick_skim.abstract: Eye blinks are among the largest physiological artefacts in electroencephalography and are typically removed from the recordings. Yet their timing may carry information about cognition. Here, we asked whether the temporal distribution of spontaneous blinks across trials provides a time-resolved behavioural signature of internal attentional focusing in working memory. In Experiment 1, blink-locked EEG analyses showed that blink timing was aligned with neural activity reflecting attentional focusing on a relevant internal representation. In Experiment 2, participants remembered the same visual information across conditions, but the relevant item was cued either early during storage, or later with presentation of the memory probe. Blink-frequency profiles shifted accordingly, increasing after the cue when selection was possible early and after the probe when selection was delayed. Post-cue blinks in the early-selection condition were also associated with better memory performance. Thus, more generally, spontaneous blinks might provide an unobtrusive chronometric signal for tracking latent cognitive processing.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: eye blink timing as marker of internal attention, relevant to eye tracking intention recognition
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 自发性眨眼的时间分布作为内部注意的时间标记，与眼动追踪和意图识别相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 自发性眨眼的时间分布作为内部注意的时间标记，与眼动追踪和意图识别相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 自发性眨眼的时间分布作为内部注意的时间标记，与眼动追踪和意图识别相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Spontaneous eye blinks are shown to correlate with attentional focusing in working memory, offering a temporal behavioral signature of internal attention.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 眼动追踪中常被忽略的眨眼信号实际上蕴含认知状态信息。本文通过眨眼锁时EEG分析发现，自发性眨眼的时间分布与工作记忆中的内部注意聚焦紧密相关。实验表明眨眼频率曲线反映注意力分配动态，可作为时间分辨的行为标记。该发现为利用眨眼信号进行意图识别提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 眼动追踪中常被忽略的眨眼信号实际上蕴含认知状态信息。本文通过眨眼锁时EEG分析发现，自发性眨眼的时间分布与工作记忆中的内部注意聚焦紧密相关。实验表明眨眼频率曲线反映注意力分配动态，可作为时间分辨的行为标记。该发现为利用眨眼信号进行意图识别提供了新思路。

quick_skim.title: Distinct Computational and Temporal Mechanisms Underlie the Joint Effects of Motivation and Working Memory on Perceptual Sensitivity
quick_skim.abstract: Human perception is continuously shaped by internal cognitive states, yet how motivation and working memory jointly influence perceptual sensitivity remains poorly understood. Here, we combined behavioural experiments, computational modelling, and pupillometry to determine whether motivation enhances perception by amplifying working memory (WM)-driven facilitation or whether both exert independent influences. Participants performed a near-threshold visuospatial discrimination task under systematically manipulated motivational and WM states. Behaviourally, both motivation and WM independently improved perceptual performance, producing the greatest enhancement when both were present. A Bayesian generalized linear psychometric model revealed that these improvements were best explained by independent additive contributions to effective perceptual sensitivity, rather than motivational amplification of WM. Consistent with this computational framework, pupil dynamics tracked trial-by-trial fluctuations in effective perceptual sensitivity while revealing temporally dissociable influences of WM and motivation during perceptual decision making. Together, our findings demonstrate that the joint effects of motivation and working memory arise from distinct computational and temporal mechanisms, providing a unified framework for understanding top-down regulation of human perception.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: pupillometry used to study motivation and working memory effects on perception, relates to computational models for understanding human goals
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用瞳孔测量研究动机和工作记忆对感知的影响，涉及理解人类目标的计算模型
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用瞳孔测量研究动机和工作记忆对感知的影响，涉及理解人类目标的计算模型
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用瞳孔测量研究动机和工作记忆对感知的影响，涉及理解人类目标的计算模型
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Combining behavioral experiments, computational modeling, and pupillometry to reveal independent effects of motivation and working memory on perceptual sensitivity.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 动机和工作记忆如何共同影响感知尚不清楚。本研究结合行为实验、计算建模和瞳孔测量，发现动机和工作记忆独立提升感知表现，且联合效果最强。贝叶斯建模表明两者通过不同机制增强感知。该工作为理解人类意图处理中的认知因素提供了计算框架。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 动机和工作记忆如何共同影响感知尚不清楚。本研究结合行为实验、计算建模和瞳孔测量，发现动机和工作记忆独立提升感知表现，且联合效果最强。贝叶斯建模表明两者通过不同机制增强感知。该工作为理解人类意图处理中的认知因素提供了计算框架。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: computational models for understanding human goals through eye movements
